title: <div>  •  Three total for the semester → If the class burns all three, fate can
content:
• Three total for the semester → If the class burns all three, fate can no longer be undone.
• If no one reverses a fate shift, the event stands permanently.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Adds extreme weight to fate counters—players must pick their moments carefully.
✔ Prevents the game from becoming too chaotic with unlimited undoing.
✔ Forces the class to work together and determine what is worth sacrificing.

📜 3. Archetype Purges Come with a Different Penalty—Not XP Loss

📜 Instead of losing XP, archetype purges now result in severe consequences unique to the archetype.

✔ Example Purge Consequences:
• The Oracle’s Curse → Can no longer see future events, permanently gains “Blind Luck” status (everything they do is randomized).
• The Executioner’s Burden → If they purge, they are permanently locked out of any offensive abilities.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 533 (chunk 533/555)
